text.title: Wireframing Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the wireframing methodology end-to-end.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.input: Feature spec, content inventory, technical constraints.
step.action: Confirm all three are present and reachable in context.

step.name: generate-variants
step.action: Generate ≥3 layout variants per key screen (e.g. single-column stack, two-column, accordion).

step.name: annotate-elements
step.action: For each variant, draft annotation table with element + behaviour + conditional_states + tech_requirement, sourced from the spec/AC.

step.name: enumerate-states
step.action: Document default / empty / loading / error / success / permission_gated per screen; include mobile breakpoint notes.
step.decision-gate: If any state is missing, block before reviewer hand-off.

step.name: open-questions-and-validate
step.action: Surface assumptions in Open Questions; run scripts/validate-wireframing.py; flag "ready for owner review".
